title: Mob Chunk Limiter
description: A mob limiter per chunks to prevent any spawner to spawn too much mobs or natural spawning
body:
### **Mob Limiter**

The Mob Limiter plugin helps server owners control mob population by limiting the number of mobs that can exist per chunk in each world. Ideal for survival, creative, and Slimefun servers, this plugin prevents mob overflows from spawners and improves performance.

### ⚙ **Highly Configurable**

Configure mob limits per world in `config.yml`. You can disable limits entirely for specific worlds by setting the limit to `-1`.

### Features

✅ **Per-World Mob Limits** - Set custom mob limits per world in `config.yml`
✅ **Chunk-Based Spawn Blocking** - Prevents mobs from spawning if the chunk already exceeds the limit
✅ **Lightweight** - No commands, no performance overhead
✅ **Compatible with Slimefun and Vanilla Spawners** - Prevents uncontrolled spawner farms
✅ **Multi-Version Support** - Works on 1.20 and 1.21
✅ **Paper, Purpur, Pufferfish Support** - Fully compatible with major Paper forks
